title: asplenium cicutarium var. dissectum
intro: Asplenium cicutarium var. dissectum, also known as the Cut-leaved Lady Fern or Fern-leaved Lady Fern, is a variety of the Asplenium cicutarium plant, which belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Asplenium cicutarium var. dissectum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
